description: German outlaw motorcycle club founded in 2011 in Cologne with predominantly Kurdish membership. Led by Kawan Azad, a former member of the Mongols. Claims no involvement in organized crime, earning income from membership fees and providing bouncers. Has chapters in Germany, Dubai, and support clubs in Sweden.

country_links.evidence_quote: Median Empire has established a support club , known as the Guerrilleros, with chapters in both Germany and Sweden ( Gothenburg and Trollhättan ).
country_links.context: The club has established a support club with chapters in Sweden.

country_links.evidence_quote: members of Median Empire had travelled to Syria to support the Kurdish Peshmerga fighting against ISIS in the Syrian Civil War
country_links.context: Members of Median Empire travelled to Syria to support Kurdish Peshmerga and distributed aid.

country_links.evidence_quote: the club is reported to have a chapter in Dubai , United Arab Emirates .
country_links.context: The club has a chapter in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
